title: Odal Node — Aluminium Sector Data (v1.1.0)
description: Aluminium sector fields for EU ESPR carbon intensity reporting, aligned with CBAM benchmarks. DPP mandate expected ~2030. v1.1.0 renames countryOfProduction to countryOfOrigin for cross-sector naming consistency.

productionRoute.description: Production route: primary (Hall-Heroult electrolysis), secondary-recycled (scrap remelting), or mixed.

co2ePerTonneKg.description: Carbon intensity in kg CO2e per tonne of aluminium produced.

recycledContentPct.description: Recycled scrap content as a percentage of total input.

countryOfOrigin.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country of origin (primary production).
